title: Trimellitates Group - Canada.ca
content:
This substance was identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).  This screening assessment focuses on 3 of the 5 substances referred to collectively as the Trimellitates Group.
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up     activities
Tris(2-ethylhexyl) trimellitate (TEHT)
1,2,4-Benzenetricarboxylic  acid, tris(2-ethylhexyl) ester
None planned at this time
Branched tridecyl and isodecyl trimellitate (BTIT)
1,2,4-Benzenetricarboxylic  acid, mixed branched tridecyl and isodecyl esters
Tristridecyl trimellitate (TTDT)
1,2,4-Benzenetricarboxylic acid, tritridecyl ester
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada  Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153,  No. 7 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment.  The related    notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 151, N o . 48 .
Two other substances (CAS RNs 53894-23-8 and  68515-60-6) were identified as being a part of the Trimellitates Group at the  outset of the third phase of the CMP . These  substances were subsequently determined to be of low concern to both human  health and the environment, through other approaches. Conclusions for these 2  substances are provided in the in  the Screening Assessment for Substances  Identified as Being of Low Concern based on the Ecological Risk Classification  of Organic Substances and the Threshold of Toxicological Concern (TTC)-based  Approach for Certain Substances .
